name: bring-back-spawner-blocking
title: Bring Back Spawner Blocking
author: BeraIV
description: Reverts the 2.1 spawner changes that broke walling off nests: removes the acid cloud, sets spawning_radius to 4 and spawning_spacing to 3. Adds a Mining-Patch-Planner-style selection tool, with a shortcut bar button and ALT+S keybind: drag it over spawners to drop a sparse grid of pipe ghosts (period = spawning_spacing) out to spawning_radius. While the tool is selected, a small panel on the left has a Force build toggle (on by default, same name as the vanilla build mode): when on, anything in the way of a pipe ghost gets marked for deconstruction and the ghost is placed anyway, like a forced blueprint paste - terrain-only obstructions like water or cliffs are left alone instead of getting an unbuildable ghost. Placements are tied to your undo queue (ctrl+z undoes a whole drag at once), and shift-drag (reverse select) also removes pipe ghosts placed by this tool.
